win_condition: Last player with at least one unrevealed influence card wins.
tiebreaker: If simultaneous elimination occurs by card effects/challenges, surviving player with most coins wins; if still tied, shared victory.

categories.label: Round Wins
categories.description: Use for match play: 1 point for each round won.

categories.label: Influence Remaining
categories.description: Optional tiebreak metric: number of unrevealed influence cards at round end.

categories.label: Coins Remaining
categories.description: Optional secondary tiebreak metric in match format.
